zh.Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Vergy I於1215年出生在法國布格o-達提爾-a特爾時，他的父親Guillaume De Vergy I35歲，母親Clémence de Fouvent26歲。他於1243年與Beatrix de Ferrette結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1263年在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額。

zh-hans.Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Vergy I于1215年出生在法国布格o-達提爾-a特爾时，他的父亲Guillaume De Vergy I35岁，母亲Clémence de Fouvent26岁。他于1243年与Beatrix de Ferrette结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1263年在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English verge ‘rod, pole, or perch (unit of length or area); half-acre’ (Old French verge), perhaps denoting the owner of that amount of land.
English: variant of Ferridge, a habitational name from Verridge Wood in Frant (Sussex). The placename probably derives from Old English fearn ‘fern, bracken’ + hrycg ‘ridge’.
Catalan (Vergé): variant of Verger, a topographic name from Catalan verger ‘orchard’ (from Latin viridiarium).

variants.name: Thivierge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Hermel, Lucien, Herve, Renald, Rosaire.
French: variant of Thibierge (and, in North America, an altered form of this), which is of the same origin as Théberge (see Theberge ). The surname Thivierge is very rare in France. Compare Verge .

History: Hippolyte Thibierge from Blois in Loir-et-Cher, France, married Renée Hervet in Blois in 1653, died in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1700. His descendants also bear another altered form of the surname, Verge.

variants.name: Verges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Raul, Carmelita, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose, Juanita, Lourdes, Nieves, Rafael, Ricardo, Vidal.  French Emile.

French (Occitan; Vergès) and Catalan (Vergés): from the plural of Occitan verg(i)èr and Catalan verger ‘orchard’, a topographic name for someone who lived near an orchard or garden, or an occupational name for someone who was employed in one (see Verge 3 and Verdier 2).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Vergy I was born in 1215, in Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Guillaume De Vergy I, was 35 and his mother, Clémence de Fouvent, was 26. He married Beatrix de Ferrette in 1243. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1263, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Vergy I est né en 1215, à Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Guillaume De Vergy I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Clémence de Fouvent, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Ferrette en 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1263, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Vergy I 1215 in Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume De Vergy I 35 und seine Mutter Clémence de Fouvent 26. Er hat 1243 Beatrix de Ferrette geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1263 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Vergy I è nato il nel 1215 nel Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume De Vergy I, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Clémence de Fouvent, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Ferrette nel 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1263, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France: フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルティル-チaテル
ja.Vergy,Burgundy,,France: フランスボウルゴグン
ja.Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France: フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアチェルリーウ
ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Vergy Iが1215年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルティル-チaテルで生まれた時，父Guillaume De Vergy Iは35歳，母Clémence de Fouventは26歳であった。1243年にBeatrix de Ferretteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1263年に故郷で48歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアチェルリーウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Vergy I(이)가 1215년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 틸-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume De Vergy I(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Clémence de Fouvent(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1243년 Beatrix de Ferrette(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1263년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 체를리외에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Vergy I nasceu em 1215, em Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guillaume De Vergy I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Clémence de Fouvent, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Ferrette em 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1263, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Vergy I родился в 1215 г. в местности тил-чaтел, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume De Vergy I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence de Fouvent, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Ferrette в 1243 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1263 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности чирлиеу, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Vergy I nació en 1215, en Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume De Vergy I, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Clémence de Fouvent, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Ferrette en 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1263, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
